items: Employed - 70% of people over age 15 are employed
Not in the labour force - 24% are retired, students, homemakers, etc.

section_summaries.people: Families with kids make up 64% of households in Willmont, while couples without children make up 20% of households and 10% of households are one person living alone. People in this neighbourhood come from 107 different ethnic origins, and 45% are first-generation immigrants, while 34% are second-generation immigrants.
section_summaries.schools: Willmont has great elementary schools, great secondary schools, elementary special programs, and secondary special programs. There are 5 public schools and 4 Catholic schools serving Willmont. The special programs offered at local schools include French Immersion, Advanced Placement, and International Baccalaureate.
section_summaries.parks: Fun is easy to find at the many parks & rec facilities here. Parks in Willmont feature playgrounds for kids, sports parks, dog parks, and skating. There are 6 parks in this neighbourhood, with 53 recreational facilities in total. The average number of facilities per park is 8.
section_summaries.homes: In this neighbourhood, there are a mix of home types. Willmont has a dynamic population, with 89% of households having moved within the past 5 years and 23% having moved within the past year. It has mostly newer homes and is mostly owner-occupied.

popular_with: families, immigrants, and people in their 30s and 40s
families with kids under 5, families with kids aged 5 to 9, families with teens, people in their 30s, and people in their 40s
